item.title: Week05
item.description:
Tempo: 70 bpm

Economy of motion!

Picking Practice

  • Alternate picking, fingers 4-2-3-1, from E to e string, 25 repetitions

  • Alternate picking, fingers 4-3-2-1, from E to e string, 25 repetitions

  • Alternate picking, 2x each time, fingers 1-2-3-4, from E to e string, 25 repetitions

  • Alternate picking, fingers 1-3-2-4, from E to e string, 25 repetitions

Amazing Grace

Using Cmaj scale.

Chromatic Scale

Write and say it out loud:

C C#Db D D#Eb E F F#Gb G G#Ab A A#Bb B

Cmaj Scale

  • Play Cmaj scale up & down, 1 min

Chord Practice

  • G Chord, 25 repetitions

  • Cadd9 Chord, 25 repetitions

  • Dsus4 Chord, 25 repetitions

  • Chord progression, G → Cadd9 → Dsus4, 3 min.

Song Practice

The Cowboy Rides Away by George Straight

Video Log

With instructor @ 85% tempo

Fender Jaguar

Pickup Position: Neck
Master Volume: 9
Master Tone: 5

Zoom G3Xn

Preset: OFF

Joyo Tremolo

Intensity: 25%
Rate: 25%

Fender Blues Jr. III

Volume: 4.0
Fat: OFF
Treble: 4.5
Bass: 7.0
Middle: 5.0
Master: 5.0
Reverb: 2.5

Blue Yeti

Gain: 10 o’clock
Mode: Stereo, on desk near plant

Lesson Video

Back to top

item.title: Week04
item.description:
Tempo: 70 bpm

Picking Practice

  • Alternate picking, fingers 4-3-2-1, from E to e string, 25 repetitions

  • Alternate picking, 2x each time, fingers 1-2-3-4, from E to e string, 25 repetitions

  • Alternate picking, fingers 1-3-2-4, from E to e string, 25 repetitions

First Song

The Cowboy Rides Away by George Straight

Chromatic Scale

Write and say it out loud:

C C#Db D D#Eb E F F#Gb G G#Ab A A#Bb B

Cmaj Scale

  • Play Cmaj scale up & down, 1 min

item.title: Week03
item.description:
Tempo: 70 bpm

Picking Practice

  • Alternate picking, fingers 1-3-2-4, from E to e string, 25 repetitions

Chord Practice

  • G Chord, 25 repetitions

  • Cadd9 Chord, 25 repetitions

  • Dsus4 Chord, 25 repetitions

  • Chord progression, G → Cadd9 → Dsus4, 3 min.

Chromatic Scale

Write and say it out loud:

C C#Db D D#Eb E F F#Gb G G#Ab A A#Bb B

Cmaj Scale

  • Play Cmaj scale up & down, 1 min

item.title: Week02
item.description:
Tempo: 70 bpm

Picking Practice

  • Alternate picking, fingers 4-3-2-1, from E to e string, 25 repetitions

  • Alternate picking, 2x each time, fingers 1-2-3-4, from E to e string, 25 repetitions

Chord Practice

  • G Chord, 25 repetitions

  • Cadd9 Chord, 25 repetitions

C C#Db D D#Eb E F F#Gb G G#Ab A A#Bb B
